name: Skeleton
goal: Reserve layout with an animated shimmer placeholder while content loads.
description: Loading placeholder with text-line, rectangle, and circle shapes. The text variant supports multiple lines with the last line shortened to mimic real prose. Decoration is hidden from assistive technology via aria-hidden.

props.name: width
props.description: CSS length (defaults: 100% for text/rect, 32px for circle).

props.name: height
props.description: CSS length (defaults: line-height for text, 80px for rect, 32px for circle).

props.name: lines
props.description: Number of text lines (only used when shape=text).

a11y.notes: All decorative elements carry aria-hidden so screen readers ignore the placeholder.
